hints: Complemento: durante nuestro viaje de verano

correctSentence: I documented my entire journey in the summer of 2023.

correctSentence: They explore the ancient ruins on Saturday.

correctSentence: The guide will organize the tour in the morning during the summer season.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: el pasajero / Verbo: comer (pasado, negación) / Complemento: en el aeropuerto

correctSentence: The tourist wandered on the street, admiring the local architecture.

correctSentence: The pilot did not navigate the aircraft at midnight during the international flight.
